metadata.title: States PCS: Jammu & Kashmir GK Questions for JKPSC Exams

questions.question: Which mountain range separates the Kashmir Valley from the Tibetan Plateau?
questions.explanation: The Zanskar Range separates the Kashmir Valley from the Tibetan Plateau and has rugged terrain in Jammu & Kashmir.

questions.question: Which major river originates from the Verinag spring in Jammu and Kashmir?
questions.explanation: The Jhelum River starts from Verinag spring at the base of Pir Panjal range in Jammu & Kashmir.

questions.question: Which national park in Jammu & Kashmir is famous for being the last habitat of the Hangul (Kashmir stag)?
questions.explanation: Dachigam National Park near Srinagar is the primary habitat of the critically endangered Hangul (Kashmir stag).

questions.question: Which tree species, native to Jammu & Kashmir, is renowned for its vibrant autumn foliage and valuable timber?
questions.explanation: Chinar (Platanus orientalis) is native to Jammu & Kashmir, famed for its striking autumn colors and valued wood; locally called Booune.

questions.question: Which annual weather phenomenon is primarily responsible for most of the winter snowfall in Jammu & Kashmir?
questions.explanation: Western Disturbances are Mediterranean-origin cyclonic systems causing major winter snowfall in Jammu & Kashmir.
